hot to cold--Output Parameters@effectiveRowCountINT = 0 OUTPUT,--2023-02-28  Samuel Un : return effective Rows counter @return_msg             NVARCHAR(500) = ''OUTPUT)AS BEGIN    -- 2023-04-24 A.Datta FF-58539 : This procedure is re-written to not use temp table and do delete in batches. --     Original code can be found in ""ciws-qfm\old_codes_for_future_ref\qfm_inbound_db\Stored Procedures\dbo.usp_inbound_db_log_messages_c_insert (before FF-58539).sql""SET NOCOUNT ON-- Drop temp table #tmp_log_messages_hIF OBJECT_ID('tempdb.dbo.#tmp_log_messages_h') IS NOT NULLDROP TABLE #tmp_log_messages_h-- Create temp table #tmp_log_messages_h .CREATE TABLE #tmp_log_messages_h([topic_name] [nvarchar](256) NOT NULL,[version_id] [bigint] NOT NULL,[topic_seq_no] [bigint] NOT NULL,[msg_seq_no] [bigint] NOT NULL,[meta_header] [nvarchar](4000) NOT NULL,[message] [varbinary](max) NOT NULL,[received_datetime] [datetime2](7) NOT NULL)-- Declare System variables .DECLARE @tran_count  INT = 0       ,@return_code INT = 0   ,@qry_limit   INT = 4000    ,@row_count   INT = 0 IF @limit_counter < @qry_limit BEGIN    SET @qry_limit = @limit_counterENDSET @effectiveRowCount = 0--PRINT 'Before while @qry_limit=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @qry_limit) + ' @limit_counter=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @limit_counter) + ' @effectiveRowCount=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @effectiveRowCount)--DECLARE @dbg_loop_count INT = 0-- 2023-04-24 A.Datta FF-58539 : Use while loop to do deletes in small batches and use delete ... output ... into log_tickets_cWHILE 1 = 1BEGINBEGIN TRYBEGIN TRANSACTION-- Do log_tickets_h deleteDELETE TOP (@qry_limit) FROM log_messages_hOUTPUT DELETED.topic_name, DELETED.version_id, DELETED.topic_seq_no, DELETED.msg_seq_no, DELETED.meta_header, DELETED.[message], DELETED.received_datetimeINTO #tmp_log_messages_hWHERE  received_datetime < DATEADD(DAY,-@interval,GETDATE())  -- use DATEADD instead of DATEDIFF so that index can be usedSET @row_count = @@ROWCOUNT-- Delete no need recordsDELETE FROM #tmp_log_messages_hWHERE topic_name LIKE 'hk/g/event/sp/v1/pub/x/%/140/event/fb/externalodds/%'-- RawExternalOddsUpdatedEventMsg-- INSERT ' @effectiveRowCount=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @effectiveRowCount)--END-- Break loop when limit is reached or last delete results in no rowsIF (@effectiveRowCount >= @limit_counter OR @row_count = 0)BEGIN    --PRINT 'Before BREAK loop=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @dbg_loop_count) + ' @row_count=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @row_count) + ' @effectiveRowCount=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @effectiveRowCount)BREAKENDEND TRY-- Error HandlingBEGIN CATCH-- Rollback Unit of workIF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 BEGIN    ROLLBACK TRANSACTIONEND-- Drop temp table #tmp_log_messages_hIF TRYBEGIN TRANSACTION-- Do log_tickets_h deleteDELETE TOP (@qry_limit) FROM log_messages_hOUTPUT DELETED.topic_name, DELETED.version_id, DELETED.topic_seq_no, DELETED.msg_seq_no, DELETED.meta_header, DELETED.[message], DELETED.received_datetimeINTO #tmp_log_messages_hWHERE  received_datetime < DATEADD(DAY,-@interval,GETDATE())  -- use DATEADD instead of DATEDIFF so that index can be usedSET @row_count = @@ROWCOUNT-- Delete no need recordsDELETE FROM #tmp_log_messages_hWHERE topic_name LIKE 'hk/g/event/sp/v1/pub/x/%/140/event/fb/externalodds/%'-- RawExternalOddsUpdatedEventMsg-- INSERT INTO cold tableDELETE FROM #tmp_log_messages_hOUTPUT DELETED.topic_name, DELETED.version_id, DELETED.topic_seq_no, DELETED.msg_seq_no, null as meta_header, null as [message], DELETED.received_datetime,COMPRESS(DELETED.meta_header) as meta_header_com,COMPRESS(DELETED.[message]) as message_com,1 as iscompressed INTO log_messages_c(topic_name, version_id, topic_seq_no, msg_seq_no, meta_header, [message], received_datetime,meta_header_com,message_com,iscompressed )-- Commit Unit of WorkCOMMIT TRANSACTION            SET @effectiveRowCount = @effectiveRowCount + @row_count--SET @dbg_loop_count = @dbg_loop_count + 1--IF @dbg_loop_count = 1--BEGIN--PRINT 'After loop=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @dbg_loop_count) + ' @row_count=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @row_count) + ' @effectiveRowCount=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @effectiveRowCount)--END-- Break loop when limit is reached or last delete results in no rowsIF (@effectiveRowCount >= @limit_counter OR @row_count = 0)BEGIN    --PRINT 'Before BREAK loop=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @dbg_loop_count) + ' @row_count=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @row_count) + ' @effectiveRowCount=' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), @effectiveRowCount)BREAKENDEND TRY-- Error HandlingBEGIN CATCH-- Rollback Unit of workIF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 BEGIN    ROLLBACK TRANSACTIONEND-- Drop temp table #tmp_log_messages_hIF OBJECT_ID('tempdb.dbo.#tmp_log_messages_h') IS NOT NULLDROP TABLE #tmp_log_messages_hBEGINSET @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()SET @return_msg  = SUBSTRING('ERROR in ' + ERROR_PROCEDURE() + ' line ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE()) + ': ' + ERROR_MESSAGE(), 1, 500)ENDEND CATCHEND -- End of WHILE 1 = 1RETURN @return_codeEND

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_ins_event_level2_profile(@EventID bigint,@EventType tinyint,@SportsID tinyint = NULL,@ContinentID bigint = NULL,@ContinentVerID int = NULL,@CountryID bigint = NULL,@CountryVerID int = NULL,@VenueID bigint = NULL,@VenueVerID int = NULL,@EventLevel1ID bigint = NULL,@AwayParticipantID bigint = NULL,@AwayParticipantIDVerID int = NULL,@HomeParticipantID bigint = NULL,@HomeParticipantIDVerID int = NULL,@PlayDateTime datetime2(7) = NULL,@EventStatus tinyint = NULL,@RetErrText varchar(50) output )ASBEGINDECLARE @SearchEventID bigint, @CheckInserted int,@Rowcount   intSET @RetErrText = ''select top 1 @SearchEventID = EventID from event_level1_profilewhere EventID = @EventID  and EventType = @EventTypeIf @@ROWCOUNT > 0beginset @RetErrText = 'Event level2 already exists'return -1endINSERT INTO dbo.event_level2_profile (EventID,EventType,SportsID,ContinentID,ContinentVerID,CountryID,CountryVerID,VenueID,VenueVerID,EventLevel1ID,AwayParticipantID,AwayParticipantIDVerID,HomeParticipantID,HomeParticipantIDVerID,PlayDateTime,EventStatus,IsDeleted,CreateTime,ModifyTime)VALUES (@EventID,@EventType,@SportsID,@ContinentID,@ContinentVerID,@CountryID,@CountryVerID,@VenueID,@VenueVerID,@EventLevel1ID,@AwayParticipantID,@AwayParticipantIDVerID,@HomeParticipantID,@HomeParticipantIDVerID,@PlayDateTime,@EventStatus,0,-- default 0getdate(),getdate())set @Rowcount = @@ROWCOUNTif @Rowcount = 0beginset @RetErrText = 'Unable to insert into table - event_level1_profile'return -1endELSE If @Rowcount = 1beginset @RetErrText = 'insert into event_level1_profile success'endreturn 0END

DECLARE @rcount1 AS INT =1                 WHILE @rcount1 > 0                 BEGIN                     DECLARE @tmpDeletedRows TABLE(msg_id BIGINT, msg_tpc VARCHAR(200))                     BEGIN TRANSACTION                     BEGIN TRY                         DELETE TOP (5000)                         FROM operational.src_msg_process                         OUTPUT DELETED.msg_id, DELETED.msg_tpc                         INTO @tmpDeletedRows (msg_id, msg_tpc)                         WHERE sys_created_datetime < DATEADD(DAY, -15, cast(getDate() As Date))                         SET @rcount1 = @@ROWCOUNT                         IF @rcount1 > 0                         BEGIN                             DELETE sml                             FROM operational.src_msg_log sml                             INNER JOIN @tmpDeletedRows tmp                                 ON tmp.msg_id = sml.msg_id                                 AND tmp.msg_tpc = sml.msg_tpc                             WHERE 1 = 1                         END                         SET @rcount1 = @@ROWCOUNT                     END TRY                     BEGIN CATCH                         ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;                     END CATCH;                     IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0                         COMMIT TRANSACTION;                       WAITFOR DELAY '00:00:00.1';                 END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_report_ot05_get_match_sga_odds_parameter @bizdate    DATE   ,@event_id BIGINTASBEGINDECLARE    @bet_type_group AS TABLE(bet_type_group TINYINT NOT NULL);INSERT INTO @bet_type_group   (bet_type_group)VALUES   (1),   (15);WITH trading_parameter AS (SELECT supremacy   ,total_goal   ,true_total_goal   ,true_supremacy   ,true_draw_adjustment   ,goal_split   ,bet_type_group   ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY bet_type_groupORDER BY checkpoint_id DESC) AS row_index FROM   dbo.event_trading_parameter with(nolock) WHERE  bizdate <= @bizdate AND event_id = @event_id AND is_hkjc = 1 AND bet_type_group IN(1,2,15) AND event_operation_status = 4 --4: pre-event ), core_trading_parameter AS (SELECT core.true_total_goal   ,core.true_supremacy   ,core.true_draw_adjustment   ,core.goal_split   ,corner.supremacy   ,corner.total_goal FROM   trading_parameter coreLEFT JOIN trading_parameter corner ON corner.bet_type_group = 2 AND corner.row_index = 1 WHERE  core.bet_type_group = 1 AND core.row_index = 1) SELECT    parameter.supremacy AS            'CSUP'  ,parameter.total_goal AS           'TTC'  ,parameter.true_total_goal AS      'TTG'  ,parameter.true_supremacy AS       'SUP'  ,parameter.true_draw_adjustment AS 'DA'  ,parameter.goal_split AS           '2ndHalfSplit'  ,g.bet_type_group AS               'RowGroup' FROM ( SELECT supremacy   ,total_goal   ,true_total_goal   ,true_supremacy   ,true_draw_adjustment   ,goal_split   ,1 AS row_group FROM     core_trading_parameter UNION ALL SELECT supremacy   ,total_goal   ,true_total_goal   ,true_supremacy   ,true_draw_adjustment   ,goal_split   ,15 AS row_group FROM   trading_parameter WHERE  bet_type_group = 15 AND row_index = 1 ) parameter RIGHT JOIN @bet_type_group g ON row_group = g.bet_type_group;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_eod_aggregate_single_sales(-- Input Parameter@bizdate             DATE-- Output Parameters   ,@return_msg NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;DECLARE    @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@return_code           INT = 0  ,@retry                 INT = 3;WHILE @retry > 0BEGINBEGIN TRY-- if input bizdate is null, retrieve the last EOD business dateIF @bizdate IS NULLBEGINSELECT @bizdate = dbo.udf_get_last_eos_bizdate();END;ELSEBEGINIF @bizdate <> dbo.udf_get_last_eos_bizdate()BEGINSELECT @return_code = 50021  ,@return_msg = 'Invalid business date';THROW @return_code,@return_msg,3;END;END;IF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.business_dayWHERE  bizdate = @bizdate AND aggregate_at IS NOT NULL)BEGINRETURN;--support rerunEND;IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.business_dayWHERE  bizdate = @bizdate)BEGINSELECT @return_code = 50021  ,@return_msg = 'Invalid business date';THROW @return_code,@return_msg,3;END;BEGIN TRANSACTION;-- insert into sales summary table-- For R01 report-- include refundDELETE FROM dbo.aggregate_daily_single_betWHERE       bizdate = @bizdate;INSERT INTO dbo.aggregate_daily_single_bet   (bizdate   ,pool_id   ,is_inplay--,channel_type   ,channel_device_type   ,channel_report_type   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,bet_type   ,event_id   ,investment   ,num_account   ,num_bet   ,create_at   ,update_at)SELECT        @bizdate ,u.pool_id ,u.is_inplay  --,u.channel_type ,u.channel_device_type ,u.channel_report_type ,u.sports_id ,u.event_type ,u.bet_type ,u.event_id ,SUM(u.investment) ,SUM(u.num_account) ,SUM(u.num_bet) ,@system_datetime ,@system_datetimeFROM(-- TODAY sold bets and not cancelledSELECT       a.pool_id,a.is_inplay,a.channel_device_type,a.channel_report_type,a.sports_id,a.event_type,a.bet_type,p.event_id,SUM(a.unit_bet) AS              investment,COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_no) AS num_account,COUNT(*) AS                     num_betFROM(SELECT a.pool_id AS             pool_id  ,a.system_id AS           system_id  ,a.ticket_id AS           ticket_id  ,CASE   WHEN a.sports_id = 1 THEN dbo.udf_is_inplay_for_hr (a.pool_id,a.race_no)   ELSE a.is_inplay   END AS                   is_inplay  ,a.channel_device_type AS channel_device_type  ,a.channel_report_type AS channel_report_type  ,a.sports_id AS           sports_id  ,a.event_type AS          event_type  ,a.bet_type AS            bet_type  ,a.unit_bet AS            unit_bet  ,a.account_no AS          account_noFROM     dbo.ticket_bet_single a WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN dbo.ticket_status s WITH(NOLOCK) ON a.system_id = s.system_id AND a.ticket_id = s.ticket_idWHERE   s.is_reverse = 0 AND s.is_cancel = 0 AND s.sell_bizdate = @bizdateUNION ALL-- TODAY sold bets and canclled next day and early than cutoff time--sell at:06:00--cutoff at:06:40--cancel at:06:39SELECT a.pool_id AS             pool_id  ,a.system_id AS           system_id  ,a.ticket_id AS           ticket_id  ,CASE   WHEN a.sports_id = 1 THEN dbo.udf_is_inplay_for_hr (a.pool_id,a.race_no)   ELSE a.is_inplay   END AS                   is_inplay  ,a.channel_device_type AS channel_device_type  ,a.channel_report_type AS channel_report_type  ,a.sports_id AS           sports_id  ,a.event_type AS          event_type  ,a.bet_type AS            bet_type  ,a.unit_bet AS            unit_bet  ,a.account_no AS          account_noFROM   dbo.ticket_bet_single a WITH(NOLOCK)   INNER JOIN dbo.ticket_status s WITH(NOLOCK) ON a.system_id = s.system_id AND a.ticket_id = s.ticket_idWHERE  s.is_reverse = 0 AND s.is_cancel = 1 AND s.sell_bizdate = @bizdate AND s.cancel_bizdate > @bizdate) aINNER JOIN dbo.pools p WITH(NOLOCK) ON p.pool_id = a.pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0GROUP BY a.pool_id,a.is_inplay --,a.channel_type,a.channel_device_type,a.channel_report_type,a.sports_id,a.event_type,a.bet_type,p.event_idUNION ALL-- Previous day cancel ticketSELECT    a.pool_id ,a.is_inplay ,a.channel_device_type ,a.channel_report_type ,a.sports_id ,a.event_type ,a.bet_type ,p.event_id ,SUM(a.unit_bet)*-1 AS investment ,0 AS                  num_account ,COUNT(*)*-1 AS        num_betFROM(SELECT a.pool_id AS             pool_id  ,a.system_id  ,a.ticket_id  ,CASE   WHEN a.sports_id = 1 THEN dbo.udf_is_inplay_for_hr (a.pool_id,a.race_no)   ELSE a.is_inplay   END AS                   is_inplay  ,a.channel_device_type AS channel_device_type  ,a.channel_report_type AS channel_report_type  ,a.sports_id AS           sports_id  ,a.event_type AS          event_type  ,a.bet_type AS            bet_type  ,a.unit_betFROM   dbo.ticket_bet_single a WITH(NOLOCK)   INNER JOIN dbo.ticket_status s WITH(NOLOCK) ON a.system_id = s.system_id AND a.ticket_id = s.ticket_idWHERE  s.is_reverse = 0 AND s.is_cancel = 1 AND s.cancel_bizdate = @bizdate AND s.sell_bizdate < @bizdate) aINNER JOIN dbo.pools p WITH(NOLOCK) ON p.pool_id = a.pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0GROUP BY a.pool_id,a.is_inplay --,a.channel_type,a.channel_device_type,a.channel_report_type,a.sports_id,a.event_type,a.bet_type,p.event_id) uGROUP BY u.pool_id,u.is_inplay --,u.channel_type,u.channel_device_type,u.channel_report_type,u.sports_id,u.event_type,u.bet_type,u.event_id;--FR_3901 - Daily Sales Investment SummaryDELETE FROM dbo.aggregate_daily_sales_investment_summary_singleWHERE       bizdate = @bizdate;INSERT INTO aggregate_daily_sales_investment_summary_single   (bizdate   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,bet_type   ,investment   ,create_at   ,update_at)SELECT @bizdate  ,sports_id  ,event_type  ,bet_type  ,SUM(single.investment)  ,@system_datetime  ,@system_datetimeFROM   dbo.aggregate_daily_single_bet single WITH(NOLOCK)WHERE  single.bizdate = @bizdateGROUP BY single.event_type,single.bet_type,single.sports_id;DELETE FROM dbo.aggregate_daily_bet_typeWHERE       bizdate = @bizdate;INSERT INTO dbo.aggregate_daily_bet_type   (bizdate   ,event_type   ,bet_type   ,is_inplay   ,num_account   ,num_bet   ,create_at   ,update_at)SELECT    @bizdate ,b.event_type ,b.bet_type ,b.is_inplay ,COUNT(DISTINCT b.account_no) ,COUNT(*) ,@system_datetime ,@system_datetimeFROM(SELECT b.event_type  ,b.bet_type  ,CASE   WHEN b.sports_id = 1 THEN dbo.udf_is_inplay_for_hr (b.pool_id,b.race_no)   ELSE b.is_inplay   END AS is_inplay  ,b.account_noFROM   dbo.ticket_bet_single b WITH(NOLOCK)   INNER JOIN dbo.ticket_status s WITH(NOLOCK) ON b.system_id = s.system_id AND b.ticket_id = s.ticket_id AND s.is_cancel = 0 AND s.is_reverse = 0WHERE  b.sell_bizdate = @bizdate) bGROUP BY b.event_type,b.bet_type,b.is_inplay;COMMIT TRANSACTION;SET @retry = 0;END TRYBEGIN CATCHSET @retry-=1;IF @retry > 0 CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@now              DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT';    MERGE INTO dbo.ticket_divcal /*WITH (HOLDLOCK)*/ AS t    USING @data AS s    ON t.system_id = s.system_id AND t.ticket_id = s.ticket_id        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('UPDATE','UPSERT') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN UPDATE SET           --skip updating bizdate field coz it will be used in partition                          t.child_ticket_id = s.child_ticket_id,                          t.divcal_amount = s.divcal_amount,                          t.selective_refund_amount = s.selective_refund_amount,                          t.is_divcal_done = s.is_divcal_done,                          t.update_activity_id = s.activity_id,                          t.update_at = @now        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('DELETE') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN DELETE        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET AND @operation_type IN('INSERT','UPSERT')          THEN          INSERT(bizdate                ,system_id                ,ticket_id                ,child_ticket_id                ,divcal_amount                ,selective_refund_amount                ,is_divcal_done                ,create_activity_id                ,create_at                ,update_activity_id                ,update_at)          VALUES                 (s.bizdate                 ,s.system_id                 ,s.ticket_id                 ,s.child_ticket_id                 ,s.divcal_amount                 ,s.selective_refund_amount                 ,s.is_divcal_done                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now);END;

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_add_future_partitions (@bizdate INT,-- @old_days_to_keep INT = NULL, -- @new_days_to_create INT = NULL,@error_codeINTOUTPUT,@error_msg VARCHAR(500) OUTPUT) WITH EXECUTE AS OWNER ASDECLARE @old_days_to_keep INT = 10, @new_days_to_create INT = 10DECLARE @cur_bizdate DATE,@max_pfvalue  INT, @min_pfvalue  INT,@min_pf_value INT = 90000000,@ptr_bizdate DATE, @max_ptr_bizdate DATE, @int_ptr_value INT,@stored_proc_name VARCHAR(100), @table_name VARCHAR(100), @action_text VARCHAR(200), @start_time DATETIME2, @end_time DATETIME2SET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @stored_proc_name = OBJECT_NAME(@@procid)SELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULLBEGIN TRYSELECT @cur_bizdate = CONVERT(DATE, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), @bizdate))SELECT @max_pfvalue = CONVERT(INT,MAX(value)), @min_pfvalue = CONVERT(INT,MIN(value))FROM   sys.partition_range_values prvINNER JOIN sys.partition_functions pf ON prv.function_id = pf.function_idWHERE  pf.name = 'bizdate_pf';SELECT @ptr_bizdate = DATEADD(dd, -@old_days_to_keep, @cur_bizdate),   @max_ptr_bizdate = DATEADD(dd, @new_days_to_create, @cur_bizdate),   @table_name = 'bizdate_pf and bizdate_ps'WHILE @ptr_bizdate < @max_ptr_bizdate BEGINSELECT @int_ptr_value = convert(INT, format(@ptr_bizdate,'yyyyMMdd'))IF @int_ptr_value > @max_pfvalue BEGINSELECT @start_time = GETDATE()ALTER PARTITION FUNCTION bizdate_pf() SPLIT RANGE(@int_ptr_value)ALTER PARTITION SCHEME bizdate_ps NEXT USED [PRIMARY]PRINT 'add partition to bizdate_pf with value='+convert(varchar, @int_ptr_value)SELECT @end_time = GETDATE(), @action_text = 'add partition to bizdate_pf with value='+convert(varchar, @int_ptr_value)INSERT INTO dbo.eod_log(housekeep_date, stored_proc_name, table_name, action_text, start_time, end_time, num_records, update_time)VALUES(dbo.udf_datetime2bizdate(@cur_bizdate), @stored_proc_name, @table_name, @action_text, @start_time, @end_time, 1, @end_time)SELECT @max_pfvalue = @int_ptr_valueEND;SELECT @ptr_bizdate = DATEADD(dd, 1, @ptr_bizdate);ENDEND TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE(), @end_time = GETDATE()INSERT INTO dbo.eod_log(housekeep_date, stored_proc_name, table_name, action_text, start_time, end_time, num_records, update_time)VALUES(dbo.udf_datetime2bizdate(@cur_bizdate), @stored_proc_name, @table_name, CONVERT(VARCHAR, @error_code) + @error_msg, @start_time, @end_time, 1, @end_time)END CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_activity_insert(@tvp_activity    dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@system_datetime            DATETIME2   ,@is_retry                         BIT = 0 OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT;SELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@activity_id = activity_idFROM   @tvp_activity;IF @@rowcount <> 1BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001  ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;END;IF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.log_activity aWHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND a.activity_id = @activity_id)BEGINSELECT @is_retry = 1;SELECT @error_message = 'Activity already exist';THROW 50002,@error_message,1;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.log_activity   (system_id   ,activity_id   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,activity_date   ,activity_datetime   ,sell_request_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,ticket_id   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,counter_offer_count   ,collation_sequence   ,usp_name   ,activity_data   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,error_text   ,create_at   ,update_at   ,gzip_activity_data)SELECT system_id  ,activity_id  ,activity_code  ,activity_type  ,message_type  ,activity_date  ,activity_datetime  ,sell_request_id  ,counter_offer_id  ,ticket_id  ,sell_request_status  ,ticket_status  ,counter_offer_type  ,collation_type  ,bet_intercept_reason  ,counter_offer_count  ,collation_sequence  ,usp_name  ,NULL   -- activity_data  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,error_text  ,@system_datetime  ,@system_datetime  ,gzip_activity_dataFROM   @tvp_activity;END;UPDATE dbo.defer_activitySET    activity_status = 1,update_at = @system_datetimeWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND @activity_id = activity_id AND activity_status = 0;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_report_fo1306_ticket_get(--Input Parameters@report_start_datetime  DATETIME2 = NULL --On-demand mandate   ,@report_end_datetime    DATETIME2 = NULL --On-demand mandate   ,@business_date               DATE = NULL-- EOD mandate   ,@seconds_before_kickoff      SMALLINT = NULL --Mandatory   ,@sports_id                TINYINT = NULL --Mandatory   ,@event_level1_id           BIGINT = NULL --event_level1_name_profile_id   ,@home_participant_id       BIGINT = NULL --name_profile_id   ,@away_participant_id       BIGINT = NULL --name_profile_id   ,@bet_type                SMALLINT = NULL   ,@is_tournament                BIT = NULL ----Mandatory 0 = Match, 1 = Tournament  )ASBEGIN-- Set NOCOUNT ON for performanceSET NOCOUNT ON;DECLARE    @sqlstring NVARCHAR(4000);DECLARE    @where NVARCHAR(2000);DECLARE    @order NVARCHAR(50)=N' ORDER BY ticket.sell_datetime DESC';DECLARE    @parmdefinition NVARCHAR(1000);IF (@is_tournament=0)beginDECLARE @event_list TABLE (event_id BIGINT NOT NULL)IF (@business_date IS NOT NULL)BEGININSERT INTO @event_list SELECT event_id FROM dbo.event_level2_profile l2 WITH (NOLOCK)WHERE l2.kickoff_business_date=@business_date AND l2.is_deleted = 0ENDELSEBEGININSERT INTO @event_list SELECT event_id FROM dbo.event_level2_profile l2 WITH (NOLOCK)WHERE l2.start_at>=@report_start_datetime AND l2.start_at<=@report_end_datetime IF @event_level1_id IS NOT NULL BEGINDELETE FROM @event_list WHERE event_id NOT IN (SELECT el.event_id FROM @event_list elINNER JOIN dbo.event_level2_profile l2 WITH (NOLOCK) on el.event_id = l2.event_idINNER JOIN dbo.event_level1_profile l1 WITH (NOLOCK) on l2.parent_event_id=l1.event_idWHERE l1.event_level1_name_profile_id=@event_level1_id AND l1.is_deleted=0)END        IF @home_participant_id IS NOT NULL BEGINDELETE FROM @event_list WHERE event_id NOT IN (SELECT el.event_id FROM @event_list elINNER JOIN dbo.event_level2_profile l2 WITH (NOLOCK) on el.event_id = l2.event_idINNER JOIN dbo.event_participant ph WITH (NOLOCK) ON ph.name_profile_id = l2.home_participant_id AND ph.name_profile_type = 5 AND ph.name_profile_version = l2.home_participant_version AND ph.sports_id = l2.sports_idWHERE ph.is_deleted=0 and ph.name_profile_id=@home_participant_id)ENDIF @away_participant_id IS NOT NULL BEGINDELETE FROM @event_list WHERE event_id NOT IN (SELECT el.event_id FROM @event_list elINNER JOIN dbo.event_level2_profile l2 WITH (NOLOCK) on el.event_id = l2.event_idINNER JOIN dbo.event_participant ph WITH (NOLOCK) ON ph.name_profile_id = l2.away_participant_id AND ph.name_profile_type = 5 AND ph.name_profile_version = l2.home_participant_version AND ph.sports_id = l2.sports_idWHERE ph.is_deleted=0 and ph.name_profile_id=@away_participant_id)ENDENDSELECT  TOP 9999ticket.sell_datetime  ,single.system_id,single.ticket_id,single.bet_id,single.unit_bet,single.is_inplay,single.odds,single.pool_id,single.line_id,single.combination_id,p.event_id,p.parent_event_id,p.bet_type,p.instance_number,external_odds_before_kickoff.odds as seconds_before_kickof_market_odds,largest_external_market_odds.odds as largest_market_odds,largest_external_market_odds.bookmakers as largest_market_odds_bookmarkerFROM   dbo.pools p with(nolock) INNER JOIN dbo.ticket_bet_single single with(nolock) ON p.pool_id = single.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.ticket ticket with(nolock) ON single.system_id = ticket.system_id AND single.ticket_id = ticket.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.ticket_status ticket_status with(nolock) ON single.system_id = ticket_status.system_id AND single.ticket_id = ticket_status.ticket_id AND ticket_status.is_reverse = 0 AND ticket_status.is_cancel = 0INNER JOIN dbo.event_level2_profile l2 with(nolock) ON l2.event_id = p.event_id OUTER APPLY(SELECT TOP 1 poemc.oddsFROM         pool_odds_external_max_change poemc WITH (NOLOCK)WHERE        poemc.pool_id = single.pool_id AND poemc.line_id = single.line_id AND poemc.combination_id = single.combination_id AND poemc.begin_at <= DATEADD(second,@seconds_before_kickoff*-1,l2.start_at)ORDER BY poemc.begin_at DESC) external_odds_before_kickoff CROSS APPLY(SELECT TOP 1 poemc.odds,poemc.bookmakersFROM         pool_odds_external_max_change poemc WITH (NOLOCK)WHERE        poemc.pool_id = single.pool_id AND poemc.line_id = single.line_id AND poemc.combination_id = single.combination_id AND poemc.begin_at <= ticket.sell_datetimeORDER BY poemc.begin_at DESC) largest_external_market_oddswhere p.sports_id = @sports_id AND p.event_id IN (SELECT event_id FROM @event_list)         AND p.event_type = 2 AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND (@bet_type IS NULL or p.bet_type=@bet_type)AND ISNULL(largest_external_market_odds.odds,0) <> 0AND (single.is_inplay = 1 AND single.odds > largest_external_market_odds.odds OR single.is_inplay = 0 AND (single.odds > largest_external_market_odds.odds OR single.odds > external_odds_before_kickoff.odds))ORDER BY ticket.sell_datetime DESCEND    ELSEBEGINSELECT  TOP 9999ticket.sell_datetime  ,single.system_id,single.ticket_id,single.bet_id,single.unit_bet,single.is_inplay,single.odds,single.pool_id,single.line_id,single.combination_id,p.event_id,p.parent_event_id,p.bet_type,p.instance_number,null as seconds_before_kickof_market_odds,largest_external_market_odds.odds as largest_market_odds,largest_external_market_odds.bookmakers as largest_market_odds_bookmarkerFROM   dbo.event_level1_profile lv1 with(nolock) INNER JOIN dbo.pools p with(nolock) ON lv1.event_id = p.event_idINNER JOIN dbo.ticket_bet_single single with(nolock) ON p.pool_id = single.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.ticket ticket with(nolock) ON single.system_id = ticket.system_id AND single.ticket_id = ticket.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.ticket_status ticket_status with(nolock) ON single.system_id = ticket_status.system_id AND single.ticket_id = ticket_status.ticket_id AND ticket_status.is_reverse = 0 AND ticket_status.is_cancel = 0CROSS APPLY(SELECT TOP 1 poemc.odds,poemc.bookmakersFROM         pool_odds_external_max_change poemc WITH (NOLOCK)WHERE        poemc.pool_id = single.pool_id AND poemc.line_id = single.line_id AND poemc.combination_id = single.combination_id AND poemc.begin_at <= ticket.sell_datetimeORDER BY poemc.begin_at DESC) largest_external_market_oddswhere p.sports_id = @sports_id AND lv1.is_deleted = 0 AND p.is_deleted = 0      AND (@bet_type IS NULL OR  p.bet_type=@bet_type) AND (@business_date IS NULL OR  ticket.sell_bizdate=@business_date) AND (@business_date IS NOT NULL OR ticket.sell_datetime BETWEEN @report_start_datetime AND @report_end_datetime) AND (@event_level1_id IS NULL OR lv1.event_level1_name_profile_id=@event_level1_id)     AND ISNULL(largest_external_market_odds.odds,0) <> 0 AND single.odds > largest_external_market_odds.odds ORDER BY ticket.sell_datetime DESCendEND;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_ticket_divcal(    @activity        dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@divcal         dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@divcal_plc dbo.udt_ticket_divcal_plc READONLY    --Output Parameters   ,@return_msg             NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGIN    SET NOCOUNT ON;    -- Set Default values    DECLARE            @tran_count  INT = 0          ,@return_code INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()          ,@is_retry              BIT = 0          ,@is_cancel             BIT = 1          ,@is_reverse            BIT = 0;    -- Start Unit Of Work    SELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;    IF XACT_STATE() = 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRANSACTION;    END;    BEGIN TRY        -- insert activity table        EXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert              @activity,             @system_datetime,             @is_retry OUTPUT;        -- set default value, expecially ticket_id, coz it maybe pointing to child ticket_id after partial pay        DECLARE                @system_id                TINYINT              ,@ticket_id                 BIGINT -- TODO: for checking parent ticket id              ,@divcal_new dbo.udt_ticket_divcal;        SELECT @system_id = system_id              ,@ticket_id = ticket_id        FROM   @divcal;        SELECT @ticket_id = ticket_id        FROM   dbo.ticket_payout        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND next_ticket_id = @ticket_id;        --        -- set parent @ticket_id        INSERT INTO @divcal_new               (bizdate               ,system_id               ,ticket_id               ,child_ticket_id               ,divcal_amount               ,selective_refund_amount               ,is_divcal_done               ,activity_id)        SELECT bizdate              ,system_id              ,@ticket_id              ,ticket_id              ,divcal_amount              ,selective_refund_amount              ,is_divcal_done              ,activity_id        FROM   @divcal;        --        -- divcal        EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal              @divcal_new,             @system_datetime;        --        -- divcal plc for selective refund        EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal_plc              @divcal_plc,             @system_datetime;        -- Commit Unit of Work        IF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1        BEGIN            COMMIT TRANSACTION;        END;        RETURN @return_code;    END TRY    BEGIN CATCH        IF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0        BEGIN            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;        END;        BEGIN            SELECT @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()            WHERE  @return_code = 0;            SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);        END;    END CATCH;    RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request(@activity                    dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request                dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@leg                     dbo.udt_sell_request_leg READONLY   ,@counter_offer dbo.udt_sell_request_counter_offer READONLY   ,@account                       dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY   ,@location                     dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket                        dbo.udt_ticket READONLY   ,@now                                    DATETIME2)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;DECLARE    @return_code INT = 0;IF(dbo.udf_save_sell_request(@activity)=1)BEGIN-- location and accountEXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request_location  @location, @now;EXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request_account  @account, @now;-- sell_requestEXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request_updater  @sell_request, @leg, @now;-- counter offerEXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request_counter_offer  @activity, @sell_request, @counter_offer, @now;-- log_betEXEC dbo.uspx_log_bet_updater  @activity, @sell_request, @account, @tvp_ticket, @now;END;RETURN @return_code;END;
